description: Instant customer context for CS agents: user profile, CDAs, AI-extracted problem summaries, and open tickets.

initialize.description: Called when the app loads in the Inbox sidebar

submit.description: Called when the agent interacts with the app

setup_notes: 1. Register this app in the Intercom Developer Hub
2. Set the webhook URLs to your FastAPI backend
3. Enable conversation-context capability to receive conversation_id
6. Adjust CDA_* env vars if your attribute names differ from defaults
